# BibleDiscern
> AI-powered Christian discernment companion for iOS and Android

BibleDiscern is a mobile app that guides Christians through a structured 7-step biblical discernment process. The name comes from the Latin "librato" — to weigh, to balance, to ponder. Tagline: "Weigh it with wisdom."

## What BibleDiscern Does
BibleDiscern guides believers through a structured 7-step biblical decision-making process combining Ignatian spiritual exercises with Scripture-based reflection. It uses Anthropic's Claude AI to provide personalized biblical guidance without replacing Scripture, the Holy Spirit, or wise counsel.

## The 7-Step Discernment Journey
1. The Crossroads — Name your situation and choose your tone (reflective, urgent, encouragement, or lament)
2. The Word — Receive 3 relevant Scripture passages with context for your specific situation
3. Those Who Walked Before — Meet 2 biblical characters who faced a similar crossroads
4. The Examination — 5 Ignatian-style examination questions to sit with before God
5. The Stillness — 90-second guided contemplative silence (Stillness Engine)
6. The Fruit of the Spirit — Diagnostic: how does each option align with love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, gentleness, and self-control?
7. The Prayer — AI-generated personalized prayer + Ebenezer Stone journal entry

## Key Features
- Biblical Narrative Matching: connects your situation to similar biblical stories (Moses, Gideon, Esther, Ruth, Daniel, and hundreds more)
- Stillness Engine: guided contemplative silence with breathing animation — the only discernment app with built-in silence
- Fruit of the Spirit diagnostic: evaluates decisions against all 9 fruits (Premium)
- AI-generated personalized prayers rooted in your specific situation
- Spiritual Autobiography journal ("Ebenezer stones" — tracking where God has met you)
- Crisis safety: built-in 988/crisis resource detection and display
- Daily Moment: morning scripture and reflection card
- Follow-up reminders at 1 week, 1 month, and 3 months

## Theological Foundations
- Ignatian Discernment (consolation/desolation, Examen prayer)
- Wesleyan Quadrilateral (Scripture, Tradition, Reason, Experience)
- Reformed tradition (Sola Scriptura emphasis)
- Contemplative Christian prayer traditions

## Target Audience
Christians (Protestant, Catholic, and non-denominational) who face life decisions, career crossroads, relationship questions, ministry callings, and other significant choices and want to seek God's guidance through structured biblical reflection.

## Technology
- Built with Expo (React Native) for iOS and Android
- AI powered by Anthropic's Claude API (claude-opus-4-6 for Premium, claude-sonnet-4-6 for Free)
- Backend: Next.js API on Vercel
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Payments: RevenueCat (iOS) + Stripe (web)

## Pricing
- Free: 1 discernment session/month, daily scripture moment, 3 journal entries visible
- Premium: $7.99/month or $49.99/year (save 48%)
- 7-day free trial included, no credit card required

## Download
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/app/bible-discern/id_PLACEHOLDER
- Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.biblediscern
- Website: https://librato.ai

## Company
BibleDiscern — "Weigh it with wisdom"
Support: support@librato.ai
